title: マイルCSの後に・アツアツ激突！

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Pheeew! I'm so full!

text_block_list.name: Bono Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe how powerful Bono is! Did you see
her round the fourth turn?!

text_block_list.name: Bono Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Every one of her steps rang out like thunder! I
couldn't help but yell and cheer just watching her!

text_block_list.name: Bono Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Biko was great too. How she fits enough power to
contend with Hishi Akebono into that small frame
is beyond me. I couldn't take my eyes off them!

text_block_list.name: Bono Fan B
text_block_list.text:
The way she kept her eyes on the prize and went
full tilt... Man, that kind of performance just
grabs your heart and doesn't let go!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: I did it... I did iiit!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Thanks! Omigosh, did you see, though?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Biko was hotter than ever today! She was like a
hard-boiled egg, right out of the pot!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I had sooo much fun racing against her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono looks even more excited than a
kid in a candy store. Just then...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Bono!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Biko!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I... I remembered! While I was running, I
remembered what you told me!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Do you remember? You said that I'm a hero to
you! When I thought of what you said, I felt a
bunch of power surge up in me!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to that, I was able to unleash my full
might and ran at my very best! Other people are
saying I did really well too!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Bono, I have a request!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biko Pegasus squares her shoulders and takes in a
deep breath.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I want to race you again on a massive stage!
Please run against me again in March at the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I'll run even harder there than I did today! I
promise to give you a race to remember!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh, Biko!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: So will you face me? Please!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Of course!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It'll be super-duper awesome to run in a race
that'll make me even more full than today!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Right, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Right! Looks like our next race is set.
Right! Looks like our next race is set.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Yaaay!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Now I have to do my best!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right! I almost forgot about the big lunch I
packed today!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
We're eating it for dinner tonight, so why don't
you join us? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next up will be the Takamatsunomiya Kinen.
We'll be doing nothing but running in order to
pursue even more excitement and fuller tummies!
